## Highlights

- **Split Add and Filter on the Nodes header** (parity with `android-v1.2.13`) — the old single ellipsis menu folded "Add by hash" / "Scan QR code" alongside the filter picker, making the add actions discoverable only after a tap-explore. Now a dedicated `+` button surfaces the two add actions directly, and the ellipsis menu carries the filter picker exclusively. Standard iOS / Material affordance split.
